AMP OVERDRIVE

The Smart Tunnel Revolution.

OverDrive transforms existing tunnel controls into a programmable, cloud-connected operating platform — without a full rip-and-replace.

*Starting price reflects AMP Clarity bundled pricing for OverDrive Base Conversion. Final pricing may vary by site configuration, expansion needs, cabinet size, installation, support, and standalone requirements.

Tunnel modernization
should not require a rebuild.

Legacy controllers hold tunnels back

Vendor-specific hardware, proprietary I/O boards, and outdated systems can limit what operators are able to change.

Modernization should not mean starting over

Changing POS, adding signage, expanding I/O, or updating the site should not require a full controller replacement.

Avoid rewiring and unnecessary downtime

OverDrive helps operators move forward without turning every upgrade into a major rebuild.

Repurpose what already works

Keep the systems that are still doing their job, then add the control and connectivity the site has been missing.

One Box. Total Control.
Any Tunnel.

OverDrive sits beside your existing control boards and takes over the signal logic that runs your tunnel. It connects the systems already on site, gives AMP visibility into tunnel activity, and creates a path to smarter operations.

It is not just another controller. It is the control platform that helps your tunnel evolve without starting over.

Replace

OverDrive captures existing controller signals in real time.

“If your tunnel runs today, it can keep running tomorrow.”

Emulate

OverDrive mirrors your current outputs so the tunnel can preserve day-one behavior.

“Install it and keep washing cars.”

Extend

Add logic, I/O, cloud sync, signage, and AMP integration when you are ready.

“Buy capability when you need it.”

Everything your tunnel has been missing —
without the replacement project.

No Full Rip-and-Replace

Works with the equipment already on site.

Lower-Cost Path Forward

Save money and time by repurposing existing hardware.

Cloud-Connected Visibility

See what is happening across your sites.

Two-Way AMP Integration

Connect the customer transaction to the tunnel experience.

Expandable I/O

Add capability as the site grows.

Next-Gen Controls

Capabilities are no longer limited by hardware.

Centralized Data

Now data from all systems live in one database.

Built for Scale

OverDrive moves you from multi-vendor, disjointed tech to one platform with scalable processes.

Finally, two way communication between the POS and Tunnel Equipment.

When OverDrive connects tunnel controls to AMP Clarity, the customer transaction and tunnel activity become part of the same operating system. AMP can connect what was purchased — wash package, add-ons, session details, and site activity — to what happens inside the tunnel.

This opens the door to smarter signage, cleaner reporting, and proactive customer service.

Same modernization goal.
Less disruption.

Built to work with what is
already on site.

OverDrive supports common tunnel environments and is built for operators with mixed systems across different locations.

OVERDRIVE
DRB TCS1 / TCS2 Sonny's WAG MicroLogic Kesseltronics NCS I/O Modbus TCP / RTU EtherCat

Built for the places
modernization gets messy.

  • AMP OverDrive upgrades limited by tunnel controllers.
  • Multi-site operators with mixed controllers.
  • Operators needing wash activity and downtime visibility.
  • Retrofit sites without replacing everything.
  • Sites adding signs or new tunnel logic.

Questions operators will ask.

OverDrive Base Conversion gives operators a lower-cost path to modern tunnel controls, with expansion options available as sites needs to grow.

OverDrive replaces the software, but works with your existing hardware.
In most cases, no. OverDrive is designed to connect to the wiring and I/O you already have, so you can avoid the cost and downtime of a full rewire.
Most Base Conversions are completed in a single visit, keeping tunnel downtime to a minimum.
The OverDrive Base Conversion — the core controller, software, and AMP Clarity bundled pricing. Expansion modules, additional I/O, and add-ons are available as your site grows.
